name: agent-harness-m2
description: Claude Code / Codex 用の最小ハーネス — branch / map / translate + scope-guard の4ゲートで、AIがコードに触る前に作業場所・既存構造・依頼解釈・編集範囲を確定する。

interface.shortDescription: Claude Code / Codex 用の最小ハーネス — branch / map / translate + scope-guard の4ゲートで、AIがコードに触る前に作業場所・既存構造・依頼解釈・編集範囲を確定する。
interface.longDescription: Agent Harness M2 is a project-local pre-work protocol for Claude Code / Codex. It packages AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, skills, hooks, installers, and a doctor script for branch -> map -> translate plus automatic scope-guard enforcement before implementation. It preserves the user's original prompt in Git history, blocks Edit/Write until the task-aware current-task state marks map and translate complete, blocks edits outside scope.files after translate, and leaves eval / test / review to the target project.
defaultPrompt: Install the harness in this repo.
